plugins.name: openclaw-frontier-stack
plugins.description: Interoperable agent skills + hooks + orchestration harness. 68 skills (37 marketing + creative, 28 engineering workflow, 3 operator), 11 role contracts, engineer CLI (openclaw) with goal templating + state persistence + ticketing, live agent runner daemon (openclaw-agent), 4 coordination patterns, 5 autonomous loops, and a Rust core workspace.
